extractedFieldValues.current_value: Daisy Mackey, a 78-year-old female, requires home health admission primarily due to her diagnosis of malignant neoplasm of the dome of the bladder (ICD-10 Code C67.1) and her secondary condition of ulcerative chronic rectosigmoiditis with fistula (ICD-10 Code K51.313).
